# Lite Co.

Type: Business

The client for [Magic lights job](../../Solutions/Magic%20lights%20job%202e058e628ba280e7b11feb451b4f28c0.md).

“You spelled light wrong.”

The use of the term “Lite” is sort of a joke, where not only are they trying to be hip, but they cut corners in their development process (A *lite* process.)
